content:
Celebrating Ecosystem Growth

Aoura Group is proud to share that our global consumer platforms have officially surpassed 100 million active ecosystem users. This growth represents a major milestone in our commitment to digital services and products.

Global Demographics & Usage

Ecosystem expansion is highly balanced across major markets:

  • North America & Europe: 45% of active user base.
  • Asia Pacific: 35%, driven by massive mobile services adoption.
  • Latin America & Middle East: 20%, showing the highest rate of year-over-year growth.
"Connecting 100 million minds is a responsibility we take seriously as we look to scale secure communication systems globally."

Continuous Platform Investments

In celebration of this milestone, Aoura Group will expand server infrastructure nodes in global centers to ensure lower latency and latency-free experiences for all global users.
